title: V1.4 WS5 — schemas/ boundary refactor (wire vs local)

metadata.description: Audit every schemas/**/*.schema.json, classify as wire (kept) or local (moved to crates/nexus-contracts/src/local/ as hand-written Rust — no codegen). Regenerate contracts (deletions only), bump @42ch/nexus-contracts minor, post cross-repo handoff note. Per schemas-boundary-v1 §2 rule (platform HTTP observability).
metadata.audit_result: 64 total: 53 wire, 11 local (2 reclassified from sketch: VersionRef→wire, KeyBlock→wire). Actual moved: 10 hand-written Rust files.
commits: 9d5fd57 docs(schemas-boundary): seed audit table with all 64 schemas/* files (WS5 T1)
